response.global_summary: A video performance of the song "All Alone With You" by Otonose Kanade, featuring an introductory greeting before the song begins.

scenes.description: The performer greets the audience and introduces the song. No vocal music is playing.
The performer sings "All Alone With You". Text 'Music: ryo (supercell)' appears. The song continues until the end of the video.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
All alone with you
I can't possibly love someone
but I still crave to be loved by someone
Even if the unchangeable yesterday continues forever
I can't go anywhere
You and I
God, where did you go? Hey
There's no reply, it's always like that
Are you still here?
You'll never walk alone
I'll go with you
Whatever sins you have
I'll bear them for you
I'll walk down the pathless road
I'll keep walking
Just the two of us
Come here
Touch me, kiss me
Would you make it even more chaotic?
If someday everyone dies
and gets forgotten
I'll only believe in what's certain now
People who act like God say
"Hey, people are strong"
That's a lie
Do you agree?
I will stay with you
With your hands
Hold me tight
With all your might
Don't be afraid
It's alright, if it's me
Even if those hands
have become dirty
I want you to love
me
You'll never walk alone
I'll go with you
Whatever sins you have
I'll bear them for you
I'll walk down the pathless road
I'll keep walking
With you
I will stay with you
With your hands
Hold me tight
With all your might
Because there's nothing
I can't hope for
Just the two of us
